zh.lifeSummary: 當Baudouin III DE CREQUY於1170年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯克雷基時，他的母親Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE32歲，父親Baudouin II DE CREQUY31歲。他和Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1237年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baudouin III DE CREQUY于1170年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯克雷基时，他的母亲Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE32岁，父亲Baudouin II DE CREQUY31岁。他和Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1237年在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CREQUY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucienne, Renold, Romain.  Spanish Alejandro, Eduardo, Beatriz, Juana, Mario, Porfirio.

Altered form of northern French Crequi: variant of Créquy, a habitational name from Créquy, a place in Pas-de-Calais, so named from Kreko, a personal name of ancient Germanic origin, + the suffix -iacum.

nameMeanings.name: Baudouin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Baudouin III DE CREQUY was born in 1170, in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his mother, Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE, was 32 and his father, Baudouin II DE CREQUY, was 31. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais. He died in 1237, in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baudouin III DE CREQUY est né en 1170, à Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, sa mère, Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE, avait 32 ans et son père, Baudouin II DE CREQUY, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais. Il est décédé en 1237, à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baudouin III DE CREQUY 1170 in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war seine Mutter Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE 32 und sein Vater Baudouin II DE CREQUY 31. Er hatte mit Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1237 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin III DE CREQUY è nato il nel 1170 nel Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo madre, Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE, aveva 32 anni e il suo padre, Baudouin II DE CREQUY, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais. Morì nel 1237, nel Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baudouin III DE CREQUYが1170年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスクルeクイで生まれた時，母Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELEは32歳，父Baudouin II DE CREQUYは31歳であった。彼はMarguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmaraisとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1237年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baudouin III DE CREQUY(이)가 1170년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 크e크이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 어머니 Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE(은)는 32세였고, 그의 아버지 Baudouin II DE CREQUY(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1237년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin III DE CREQUY nasceu em 1170, em Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, sua mãe, Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE, tinha 32 anos e seu pai, Baudouin II DE CREQUY, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais. Ele faleceu em 1237, em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baudouin III DE CREQUY родился в 1170 г. в местности крeкуи, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его матери по имени Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE было 32 года, а отцу, которого звали Baudouin II DE CREQUY, 31. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais. Он умер в 1237 г. в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baudouin III DE CREQUY nació en 1170, en Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su mamá, Clémence D'AIRE STRASELE DE VAN STRAZELE, tenía 32 años y su papá, Baudouin II DE CREQUY, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Marguerite de Saint-Omer Dame de Clairmarais. Murió en 1237, en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 67 años.
